revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: remove obsolete category Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata zh
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Merge [[Category:人物名目録（日本）]] into [[Category:Lists of Japanese People]] via bot
Merge [[Category:平安時代の人物別のトピックス]] into [[Category:Topics by Person in the Heian Period]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Merge [[Category:安倍氏]] into [[Category:Abe Clan]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "[[Category:Pages we need to rename]]{{citation needed|"
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:安倍晴明]] to [[Category:Abe no Seimei]]: Merge [[Category:安倍晴明]] into [[Category:Abe no Seimei]] via bot
Bot: concatenate old target wikitext
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Pages we need to rename
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Unmoved pages with commons links
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from zh→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from zh→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "Sangoku Sōden In'yō Kankatsu Hoki Naiden Kin'u Gyokuto Shū" to "Shinnaiden"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q30108860)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Commonscat}} {{Catmore}} {{Catlink|陰陽道を題材とした作品}} {{citation needed|あへ の せいめい}} {{Commons category|Abe no Seimei}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:安倍晴明}} {{translated page|ja|Category:安倍晴明|version=95178225}} {{wikidata link|Q30108860}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:Abe no Seimei]] [[ja:Category:安倍晴明]] [[zh:Category:安倍晴明]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Seimei_Shrines]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Shinnaiden]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Shinnaiden]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Abe Clan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Deified Japanese people]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Lists of Japanese People]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Redirects]] [[Category:Topics by Person in the Heian Period]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after religious figures]]
